description: S5D plugin hooks — Rust enforcement chain (S5D-Spec: feat.s5d.pretool-enforcement). Every command is guarded by `command -v s5d`: a plugin install without the CLI binary degrades to a one-line install hint at session start instead of a failing hook on every tool use.

hooks.command: if command -v s5d >/dev/null 2>&1; then s5d update auto 2>/dev/null || s5d update check --hook 2>/dev/null || true; else echo 's5d binary not installed — clone https://github.com/system5-dev/s5d and run ./install.sh'; fi
if command -v s5d >/dev/null 2>&1; then s5d hook pretool-edit; fi
if command -v s5d >/dev/null 2>&1; then s5d hook pre-commit-validate; fi
if command -v s5d >/dev/null 2>&1; then s5d hook require-spec; fi
if command -v s5d >/dev/null 2>&1; then s5d hook user-prompt-submit; fi
